Why Reliqt
The smarter way to own legendary cards
Fully Insured Vault
Every card is stored in a professional, insured vault. Your tokens are backed by real PSA-graded collectibles.
100%Vault Coverage
Real On-Chain Ownership
Your tokens live on Base blockchain. Trade 24/7 on Uniswap, see your holdings on DexScreener anytime.
BaseEthereum L2

A Charizard PSA 9 costs $47,500. With Reliqt, you can own a fraction of it for just $1.

The Flow
Three steps to own your first card
01 — CONNECT
Connect Your Wallet
Connect MetaMask, Bitget, or OKX wallet. Switch to Base network — transactions are fast and cheap.
02 — BUY
Buy Card Tokens
Browse the marketplace. Buy fractional tokens of PSA-graded cards starting from just $1 in USDC.
03 — TRADE
Trade on Uniswap
Your tokens trade on Uniswap V4. Watch price charts on DexScreener. Sell anytime or redeem the physical card.
